title: cracca madrensis
side_effects: Cracca madrensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to its toxic compounds. Prolonged consumption can lead to liver and kidney damage, as well as increased risk of bleeding and bruising. In severe cases, misuse of the plant can cause respiratory failure, cardiac arrest, and even death. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using any plant-based remedies to avoid these and other potential side effects.
